author: IRENÆUS
book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus

classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

lineage: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus

ccel.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

title: XXXVIII.

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: The apostles ordained, that “we should not judge any one in respect to meat or drink, or in regard to a feast day, or the new moons, or the sabbaths.”

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: Whence then these contentions? whence these schisms?

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: We keep the feast, but in the leaven of malice and wickedness, cutting in pieces the Church of God; and we preserve what belongs to its exterior, that we may cast away these better things, faith and love.

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: We have heard from the prophetic words that these feasts and fasts are displeasing to the Lord.
